/usr/bin/cc -mcpu=cortex-m3 -mthumb -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,-Map=/home/richardshoorf/due1/build_codex/due_app.map -T/home/richardshoorf/due1/linker/sam3x8e_app.ld CMakeFiles/due_app.dir/cmsis/SAM3X/Device/Source/system_SAM3XA.c.o CMakeFiles/due_app.dir/startup/startup_sam3x8e.c.o CMakeFiles/due_app.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/due_app.dir/src/init.c.o CMakeFiles/due_app.dir/src/uart.c.o CMakeFiles/due_app.dir/params/param.c.o -o due_app.elf
